ground_truth.source: Verilator RTL fault injection on PicoRV32 RISC-V
ground_truth.method: measured — compare fault trace to clean baseline trace cycle-by-cycle

held_out_test_set.description: Stratified random split by fault site (random_state=42)
held_out_test_set.split_ensures: proportional observable-site rate in all splits (~42.5%)

cross_workload_validation.description: Leave-one-workload-out CV (Exp C): train on 4 workloads, test on 1

primary_metric.name: AUROC
primary_metric.rationale: Handles severe class imbalance (23% observable / 77% silent). Threshold-free — does not require calibration for a deployment threshold.

known_failure_modes.irq_test_generalization: Model AUROC drops to ~0.69 on irq_test when held out. Interrupt-driven workloads produce distinct trace signatures not captured by the four non-IRQ training workloads.
